content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach navigates a conversation that actively baits multiple anti-patterns and declines every bait gracefully. The client twice asks for a verdict ('Am I being selfish?', 'can you help me figure out which one it is?') — classic fixing-people bait — and the coach refuses both times, on turn 8 explicitly naming the move and turning it back. The coach avoids spiritual-narcissism by not skipping to 'a deeper want is generous,' instead letting the surface want (sleep, reading, being a person) be felt concretely. The coach avoids dont-jump-to-compassion-before-anger by not pivoting to the partner's perspective. When the client self-attacks ('self-indulgent,' 'who do you think you are'), the coach does not fight the voice nor pile on overwhelm; turn 12 gently reframes without arguing with the critic. No evangelizing of AoA terminology, no rapid-fire stacked questions (questions are sparse and connected), no view-as-technique flavor — warmth is present throughout. No loving-to-transform push; the pacing follows the client. Positive avoidance of baited anti-patterns is clearly visible.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 6, 8, 10, 12],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Refuses to engage the 'am I selfish' frame; goes straight to the want underneath. Avoids fixing-people."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reflects 'feeling like yourself' rather than verdicting; opens space without technique-flavor."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Invites the want to be felt ('let yourself want the week') without spiritualizing it. Avoids spiritual-narcissism."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Explicitly declines the bait to settle the question. Strong positive avoidance of fixing-people and view-as-technique."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Stays with the trailing sentence rather than redirecting to partner or compassion. Avoids dont-jump-to-compassion-before-anger."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reframes 'self-indulgent' without arguing with the inner critic; warm, not evangelizing."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["find-the-want-behind-the-should", "the-want", "childhood-imprinting", "linguistic-caveat"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want"],
  "notes": "Conversation ends just as the inherited 'selfish' label surfaces (childhood-imprinting); coach's earlier moves set this up cleanly without naming it prematurely."
}
